entry.title: Re: IDOC xsd import giving error in message mapping in SA...
entry.content: Thank you Andrej 🙂 it helped. Just 1 question - i can post a new question but maybe you know already. I know that there is an option for uploading a message mapping in the package. I can use NWDS to export message mapping as xlsx but only zip format can be uploaded in the package -> add -> message mapping. Is there a way to convert the exported message mappings to zip? i have been searching and i am unable to find any post on this. And anyways complex mappings and those with UDF are not getting exported in NWDS so that is another issue. Any advice?

entry.title: Re: IDOC xsd import giving error in message mapping in SA...
entry.content: Hi Andrej, i have 2 target messages and when i add them (adding target messages.png) they look ok but when i say ok and come back to the actual mapping screen it shows additional IDOC as target in amber colour even though message 1 is email and message 2 is already an IDOC. Reference - adding idoc.png. I need only 1 target IDOC and i cannot get rid of this last target under the top node Messages (extra idoc under messages.png)

entry.title: Re: Story reports showing time values one hour prior to actual time values
entry.content: Hello! I'm facing the same issue, only that I have a 3-hour difference. I've tried everything but nothing seems to work. Have you found any solution for this inconvenience? Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: I am getting 'No data found ' error when ever i am tr...
entry.content:
Hello @Prasanth13 

The “No data found” error in your RAP unmanaged with draft setup is likely caused by the system’s inability to read draft data properly.

Key reasons:

  1. Missing READ_DRAFT_ENTITY method
    – You must implement this to return draft data. Without it, the UI can’t find the draft.
  2. GET_DRAFT_ADMIN_DATA not implemented
    – Needed to return draft metadata like DraftUUID, timestamps, etc.
  3. Incorrect handling of IS_ACTIVE_ENTITY
    The framework checks if it's a draft or active record. If your read logic doesn’t handle IS_ACTIVE_ENTITY = abap_false, no draft data will show.
  4. Draft tables not filled
    – On creation, make sure draft data is written correctly to your draft table.

What to do:

  • Implement READ_DRAFT_ENTITY
  • Implement GET_DRAFT_ADMIN_DATA
  • Handle IS_ACTIVE_ENTITY properly
  • Check that draft records are written

With kind regards

Chuma

entry.title: Re: Tutorials no longer open
entry.content:
Hello @LJ1010 

If the tutorials on the SAP Build Apps tutorial page aren't opening, regardless of the browser, here are a few possible causes and quick steps to resolve the issue:

Common Causes and solutions

1.Pop-up Blockers or Browser Extensions

Some tutorials open in overlays or new tabs.

  • Disable any ad blockers, privacy extensions, or script blockers
  • Allow pop-ups for developers.sap.com in your browser settings

2.Cookies & Local Storage Issues

Old or corrupted cache/cookies can block interactive content.

  • Open the page in private/incognito mode
  • Or clear cache & cookies for developers.sap.com

3.SAP Tutorial Platform Glitch

The content may not load due to internal issues with SAP’s tutorial platform.

  • Open the direct link to the tutorial:
    https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/build-apps-create.html
  • If that doesn’t work, test another tutorial from a different category (e.g. CAP, BTP onboarding) to see if it's site-wide

4.Network / Firewall Issues

Corporate or school networks might block SAP content domains.

Try this

  • Switch to a personal or mobile hotspot network temporarily
  • Check browser console (F12 > Console tab) for blocked scripts or CORS errors

If none of this works, let me know what region you’re accessing from or if you’re behind a company VPN

With regards

Chuma

entry.title: Re: Near Fixed bin Strategy : SAP-EWM
entry.content: Thanks for explaining very clearly rohela

entry.title: Re: Next Generation - IT Operating Model (SAP Centric)
entry.content: hey @JustinBroughton , thanks for the article, very insightful.

entry.title: Re: ✨ How to Identify SAP Fiori Apps Based on RAP (RESTful Application Programming Model)
entry.content:
This post clearly has been written with ChatGPT. Please check the Rules of Engagement for the new rules about GenAI assisted content: https://pages.community.sap.com/resources/rules-of-engagement

Please be aware that these types of posts are unlikely to impress anyone in a professional community. People are quite good at seeing through the generated content and it doesn't help to build a good reputation. So, why do it?

entry.title: Manage SAP Build projects as part of your enterprise architecture
entry.content:
Recently, I transitioned from SAP Landscape Management to the product management team of SAP LeanIX. I landed in a fantastic team already hard at work on the integration between SAP LeanIX and SAP Build, and I was fortunate enough to help bring the first release across the finish line, which was announced last week.

Now, you can seamlessly connect your SAP Build instances with your SAP LeanIX workspaces, enabling automatic discovery of your SAP Build projects. This empowers enterprise architects to model these projects as application fact sheets, integrating them directly into their daily workflows within SAP LeanIX.

SAP Build is described as a "unified application development and process automation solution, enabling personalization and efficiency at scale." (source) It's a vital part of our customers' IT landscapes, complementing their existing SAP solutions. Consequently, the custom projects setup within SAP Build represent the unique, differentiating elements of their landscapes. Managing these projects alongside other SAP and non-SAP solutions within SAP LeanIX is a natural and essential next step.

Connecting the Dots

Rather than diving deep into the documentation, let me give you a quick overview of how to regularly discover your SAP Build projects within your SAP LeanIX workspace.

You'll need an instance of SAP Build Process Automation (even if you primarily use other SAP Build components) and an instance of SAP Cloud Management Service within your SAP BTP subaccount. The Cloud Management Service provides the context to the SAP BTP Global and Subaccount. Using service keys for these two instances, you can configure the new "SAP Build" integration within the admin area of SAP LeanIX.  Once you complete the onboarding wizard, your SAP Build projects will be automatically discovered and regularly updated.

The SAP Discovery inbox will present you with a list of all discovered projects. From there, you can link them to existing fact sheets or create new ones. The integration intelligently suggests the following fact sheet types:

  • Application: The project itself
  • IT Component: The technology used within the project (e.g. SAP Build Code)
  • Platform: SAP BTP, your global account, and the subaccount
  • Provider: SAP

I'm eager to hear your thoughts on this new integration! Does this address a pain point in your enterprise architecture work? What other challenges are you facing when managing extensions to your SAP solution portfolio?  Share your feedback in the comments below or on our roadmap item!

entry.title: Manual Tax entry between two partner companies
entry.content:
Dear All,

We have created a manual tax entry between two partner companies, however, when checking the Journal Entry, the Partner company ID is not filled.
Why is it happening?

Regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Manual Tax entry between two partner companies
entry.content:
Dear All,

The Business Partner field in Manual Tax Entries is not posting relevant. It is only used for reporting purposes. 

Refer to the KBA 3434365 - Business Partner Field in Manual Tax Entries not Derived in Journal Entry https://me.sap.com/notes/3434365 for additional details, please.

Regards,
Anderson
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA 2023 Fully-Activated Appliance: Known Issues
entry.content:
Hello Sascha,

same problem for me. 

Did you check the log in /var/tmp/hdb_HDB_hdblcm_register_rename_system_*/hdbrename.log

On my side, the hdblcm want to change permissions on a folder which is not present:

22:36:13.425 - INFO:   Creating temporary Local Secure Store file system
22:36:13.425 - ERR :     Failed to change permissions of directory '/usr/sap/HDB/lss'

I have tried a lot. But nothing helps. I assume, that it is a bug in the Appliance.
I am currently open a SAP Call.

Best regards

Steffen Herrmann

entry.title: Re: (Datasphere/SAC) Time Dimension attributes not visibl...
entry.content:
Hi, got it. I missread. I thougth you are using time dependent dimensions. For standard dimension it is not needed, sorry. 

I did read now fully the question. I would say the reason can be the SAC to DSP connection issue, which currently takes a toll on everything... I observed lost hierarchy data (only nodes loaded), sudenly all AM measures in the widget, even only a handfull were selected, ... quite a problem if the connection gets lost randomly at a random step.   

Try to delete and re-create the chart.

entry.title: Re: SAP CodeJam Topics
entry.content:

are you offering also something in the area move from ECC to S4, ATC Findings, Custom Code Adjustments, Simplification list?

 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: SALV Report with Checkbox Selection and Designation Based Toolbar Buttons in SAP ABAP
entry.content:
There are many SALV demo reports (go to SE38 and search for SALV*DEMO*) and tons of information already available online. For example, this post with many tips is one of the top hits on Google.

There is an option to exclude buttons on the toolbar, two different toolbars shouldn't be needed (see this old post ).

Navigation to a tcode for a single document should be implemented as a "hot spot" that reacts to a click. Checkbox + button is a poor UI choice for such interaction, which then forces to implement "select just 1 item" error. 

Please take a look at Clean ABAP too when you get a chance. There are many things in the code that could be improved. It looks like what ChatGPT generates when you ask for an SALV report. This doesn't "modernize" anything, sadly.

In ABAP, SALV is one of those eternal subjects, like love and money in cinema. But it would be cool if the authors would look at information already available out there and tried to add or improve something. No one is expecting The Godfather of SALV blog posts at this point, but at least some respectable effort.

entry.title: Re: Scenario Datasphere and SAC Story, dynamic valuelist...
entry.content:
in the OnInit or OnActive script. Take a 'dummy table' with the values, loop into an array and add the array into the drop-down

 

//fetch
var resulset = table.getDataSource().getResultSet(); --> table will be a hidden widget with the dimension you would like to use
 
for( var i = 0; i < resulset.length; i++){
//Populate Dropdown
drop_down.addItem(resulset[i]["[Field]"].id/description);
Global_Variable_for_later_use.push(resulset[i]["[Field]"].id/description);
}

entry.title: Re: Planning time fence issue
entry.content: The factory calendar is configured without holidays. In the MRP view, I set a planning time fence of 30 days with MRP type M1 and lot-sizing procedure M1 (monthly batch creation). For example, today is June 12th—when I check MD04, the planning time fence end date shows August 1st (the next month after 30 days) instead of July 11th. Testing revealed this may be caused by the lot-sizing procedure. When I switched M1 to EX and refreshed MD04, the planning time fence correctly adjusted to July 11th (30 days later). Question: How can I maintain the lot-sizing procedure as M1 while ensuring the planning time fence ends on July 11th?

entry.title: Re: Extract country-wise holiday lists from open websites...
entry.content:
There are several open websites which allow access to their holiday database via API calls.

A possible design could be something like below:
1. Create an ABAP program which leverages the CL_HTTP_CLIENT=>CREATE_BY_URL method to make API calls to the open website database.

2. Save the API response in a SAP table.

3. Expose the table data via CDS/HANA view and use it in your BW model. 

 

References:

Client Architecture (SAP Library - Components of SAP Communication Technology)

entry.title: Grandes players do Rio implementando SAP S/4HANA com abordagem Greenfield
entry.content:
No coração do Rio de Janeiro, grandes empresas estão adotando transformações disruptivas com SAP S/4HANA, escolhendo o caminho do Greenfield – construindo do zero e criando processos operacionais do futuro.

E para você que deseja entrar no mercado de projetos SAP, você deve saber como é um projeto de implementação “green”. 

✅ Por que escolher o Greenfield?

* Processos limpos e otimizados (Reinício completo sem depender de customizações antigas);
* Adoção de melhores práticas SAP (Construção nova permite aproveitar as funcionalidades nativas do S/4HANA e SAP BTP);
* Convergência digital (Integração ativa com nuvem e automação para acelerar inovação.

Com isso que escrevi, hoje você se sente apto para seguir num projeto greenfield? Escreva nos comentários.

#SAP

entry.title: Re: Export SAP EnableNow Metadata
entry.content:
Hi Charlene,

You sure can.  To do this:

1. Open Producer
2. Click on the Group object for the part of the content hierarchy that you want to export metadata for
3. Select Tools > Workspace Structure > Export Structure
4. Enter a name for the CSV file and click Save
5. Open each of the sections of attributes that can be exported and select the information that you would like to export.  In particular, ensure that the Published View link in the Start Link section is selected
6. Click OK

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Getting Started with SAP Companion
entry.content:
@ShaneLipke / @KristinaKunad ,

Are there any articles on bestowing Companion to SAP ECC/TMS/EWM, and to non-SAP applications? Say, any MS Office products (Word, Excel, Outlook, Edge, BI, etc)? We've recently acquired Enable Now for our organisation, and are wanting to to utilise Companion.

Thanks

Matt

entry.title: Re: CPQ Release changes to UI?
entry.content: All the breaking changes including UI and non UI action items will be published by sap here : https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_CPQ/abe5bf645c9542a5bd4cbfdcc1a4876c/82d3cd4d2179468ea2f61c9438315944.html

entry.title: Re: CPQ 2.0 Quote Table On Cell Changed Event Triggers
entry.content: They only run when a user interacts with a Quote Table through the user interface (HTML elements).

entry.title: Re: Getting Started with SAP Companion
entry.content:
Hi Matt,

You can start by going through the content of the Getting Started with SAP Companion post.  In that post, you will see reference to two key documents:

Supported Applications and Content Scenarios - this document helps you to understand which applications support the use of SAP Companion
SAP Companion Integration Guide - this document provides the configuration instructions to use SAP Companion

Watch this video for an overview of the process of configuring SAP Companion for SAP systems.

Watch this video for an introduction to configuring SAP Companion for non-SAP applications.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: CPQ 2.0 - OnItemCopied event (global script)
entry.content: What values are we expecting ? If you want the old unique id you, instead of tracing at the end of the script do it before assigning the custom field.

If we may know further regarding this matter also, would you like to kindly help us on explaining how to capture (include) Credit Memo from SD module into SAP FI RAR module while it has no Billing Plan information in the Sales Order? thank you and we are looking forward to discussing this with you.

entry.title: Re: TR isnot getting imported in QA although release in d...
entry.content:
Hi madhu,

If your change document is urgent change, then when the status is to be tested, it will import the tr into qa system, when in status Successfully tested, there is no import action. If tr is not imported into qa, you may go to qa system to check the tr import logs to see if any import errors there.

If your change document is normal change, then at status Successfully tested, it only release the tr, you need to go to the related task list to manually trigger the import into qa or using a backend job to trigger the import action. And if the tr is not imported even via task list or backend job, you need to check the related logs(task list/backend job log or the import log) to see if any errors there.

If above doesn't help, you may need to raise a support ticket to SAP and open your system connections for checking further.

BR

entry.title: Properties from associated entity via personalization in Fiori Elements List Report?
entry.content:
Hi,

We have a requirement to make fields in an associated entity available in the personalization menu (cog-wheel to add optional columns) in a oData v4 Fiori Elements List Report. With a sample data model like that

entity RootEntities : cuid {
    name                        : String;
    contact                     : Association to one Contacts;
};

entity Contacts : cuid {
    name                        : String;
    phone                       : String;
    building                    : String;
    country                     : Country;
    street                      : String;
    city                        : String;
    postCode                    : String;
    addressLabel                : String;
    photoUrl                    : String;
}
We can add annotations like this to get the "city" in the standard layout (user can deselect it in personalization)

annotate service.RootEntities with @(
    UI.LineItem : [
        {
            $Type               : 'UI.DataField',
            Value               : name,
            ![@UI.Importance]   : #High,
        },
        {
            $Type               : 'UI.DataField',
            Value               : contact.city,
            ![@UI.Importance]   : #High,
        },
    ]
)
We would however like to have them included as optional (not shown by default, but let the user add them in personalization). For the Filter Bar we can do that like this, which makes all properties not marked as UI.HiddenFilter appear in the "Adapt Filters" dialog.

"targets": {
    "RootEntityListReport": {
        "options": {
            "settings": {
                "entitySet": "RootEntities",
                "controlConfiguration": {
                    "@com.sap.vocabularies.UI.v1.SelectionFields": {
                        "navigationProperties":  [ "contact" ]
                    }
                },
But we are not finding any corresponding manifest setting or annotation to do the corresponding for the columns?

It is possible to achieve it by bringing in all the fields explicitly in the UI.LineItem and then override the availability from the manifest, like that

"controlConfiguration": {
    "@com.sap.vocabularies.UI.v1.LineItem": {
        "columns": {
            "DataField::contact::city": {
                "availability": "Adaptation"
            },
But that is very cumbersome (in particular in our use case where the actual entity is a reused reference across many entities and we want this pattern consistently across all the apps.

Hoping I am just missing something obvious here and there is a simple solution, grateful for any inputs. Thanks!

//Carl

entry.title: Re: Understanding Joule - (Step #3) Joule Architecture
entry.content:

That kind of architecture, i am looking for, if it is available. 

Thank you

entry.title: Billing Calculation from SD Credit Memo to be processed into RAR
entry.content:
Hi All SD, FI, RAR Experts.

If we may know, would you like to kindly help us on explaining how to capture (include) Credit Memo from SD module into calculation process in SAP FI RAR module,

while we know the standard behaviour of Credit Memo has no Billing Plan information in its Sales Order document?

Thank you so much, and we are looking forward to discussing this with you.

Ani.

@former_member735915  @Kartik_Dua SD (Sales and Distribution) SAP Revenue Accounting and Reporting SAP S/4HANA Finance

entry.title: SAP 分析云 2025 QRC2 更新之计划性能提升
entry.content:
在 SAP 分析云 2025 QRC2 的更新中，我们针对计划功能，进行了进一步的性能方面的改进和提升。本文主要简单介绍这些增强功能，讨论其触发条件以及所需的特殊设置。对于像“计划范围”这样广泛且需要大量配置的功能，我们还将发布一篇单独的文章以提供更多的详细信息。 

对于 2025 年 QRC2 版本，我们将重点介绍以下与计划相关的性能提升： 

  • 带参数的数据/多步操作的运行速度加快 
  • 多步骤数据操作的运行速度加快 
  • 移除多步操作步骤中的重复作业创建

带参数的数据/多步操作的运行速度加快 

在此增强功能中，我们在添加数据操作参数以解析筛选值时，降低了部分性能开销。具体来说，我们在以下方面降低了数据/多步操作执行的性能开销： 

  • 将故事或输入控件筛选器绑定到数据/多步操作参数 
  • 故事 API 脚本提供数据/多步操作参数的上下文 

我们进行了技术增强，以更有效地将筛选器 ID 转换为短 ID，因为这一过程耗时较长，通常在执行准备期间可以观察到。客户无需进行任何额外操作即可享受此性能提升。 

多步骤数据操作的运行速度加快 

在此增强功能中，我们缩短了数据操作的整体执行时间，特别是那些包含多个步骤且每步执行相对较快的数据操作。数据操作在准备步骤中使用异步调度后续作业的方式来为数据操作步骤创建后续作业。现在，后续作业仅在剩余作业超时时间不足时才会动态生成，从而可以在当前作业中执行下一步，而无需创建新作业。随着作业接近超时，该过程会迭代地生成另一作业来分配剩余工作，以确保作业执行更加优化。客户无需进行任何额外操作即可享受此性能提升。 

移除多步操作步骤中的重复作业创建 

在执行多步操作时，系统会为每个步骤创建一个单独的作业，以避免会话超时问题。例如，如果一个多步操作包含三个数据操作步骤，它将生成三个作业，每个作业在调用时处理一个数据操作步骤。我们已简化这一设计，以移除重复作业，因为某些步骤（如数据操作和数据导入步骤）本身在其逻辑中会创建作业。 

具有多个数据操作步骤或数据导入步骤的多步操作将从这一增强功能中获益最多。从客户的角度来看，利用这一优化无需进行任何额外配置。 

总结 

在 SAP 分析云的 2025 年 QRC2 版本中，我们推出了一系列技术改进，旨在优化数据/多步操作的性能，尤其是在涉及参数和/或多个步骤时。这些增强功能不仅确保了更快的运行时间，还通过消除不必要的处理开销简化了执行过程，而无需任何额外的技术配置。 

SAP 采取这种积极主动的方式来持续改进性能，充分表明了我们致力于提供高效、稳健的解决方案，以满足客户的期望和需求。通过提高这些增强功能的透明度，SAP 支持客户更有效地利用这些与计划相关的性能优化，从而提供更愉悦的用户体验。 

 

原文作者： Derek 

原文链接：https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-sap/learn-how-sap-is-enhancing-performance-of-sap-analytics-cloud-for-qrc2-2025/ba-p/14114582

entry.title: Why there no change records after change routing using CP_BD_DIRECT_INPUT_PLAN_EXT
entry.content:
Hi, All:

We use the function CP_BD_DIRECT_INPUT_PLAN_EXT to batch modify routings, and it succeeds. However, when I query the system tables CDPOS and CDHDR for change records, I cannot find any modification records. Why is this? Is it determined by a parameter of the function, or do we need to use another function to modify? Also, what is the difference between CP_BD_DIRECT_INPUT_PLAN_EXT and CP_BD_DIRECT_INPUT_PLAN?

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: SAP CPQ Local Pricing vs Stateless Pricing vs Document Pricing
entry.content: @akhilesh595 I'll get cracking and let you know when the post is up.

entry.title: Re: the billing staus of sales order item in the CDS
entry.content: Yes. The status definition is different across business object. Therefore, you should join relevant views to get correct status.

entry.title: Valuation Variants Production Order Costing
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

about Valuation Variants Production Order Costing :

Tcode:OPN2

1、Which data retrieval logic is used in CK11N?

2、What do these mean? What is their logic?

1~Z

 

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Getting Started with SAP Companion
entry.content:
Thanks @ShaneLipke . I've watched your other videos on Enable Now and will now get stuck into these!

I can't find (yet?) on the Supported Applications and Content Scenarios site where you find info about setting up Companion for SAP ECC or MS Excel, for example.

Matt

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2023 Available Now
entry.content: Thank you so much to @julieplummer20 and the teams who involved in this project.

entry.title: Re: Getting Started with SAP Companion
entry.content:
Hi Matt,

If you are using SAP GUI to access ECC, you will have to use SAP Companion for Desktop, not SAP Companion.  If you are talking about a version of Excel that runs in a browser, the third-party version of SAP Companion might be able to be deployed but if you are using an installed version of Excel, that will definitely require SAP Companion for Desktop.  SAP Companion is only for use with browser-based applications.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: What are other connectivity options apart from SAP Integration Suite in Private cloud edition
entry.content: Hi Everyone, I want to know about connectivity options from sap to non sap legacy system in Private cloud edition. Integration Suite is not in picture. So what else we can recommend as offerings from SAP BTP Platform?

entry.title: Re: Material Standard Cost Estimate (CO-PC-PCP)
entry.content: Excellent information... many thabks...!

entry.title: Re: Cannot read entities during delete operation of child entity in ABAP RAP (MANAGED DRAFT)
entry.content: Was there any solution or work around to this?

entry.title: Email notification trigger to internal requestor when PO change via background job
entry.content:
Hello Guru,

We have built a program in SAP ECC to close SRM POs. When users close the SRM PO via a background job, an email notification is triggered and sent to the requestor. This issue only occurs when the PO is closed using a background job. Has anyone else experienced this issue before? How can we prevent the email notification from being triggered when the PO is closed via a background job?

entry.title: Re: unable to see in HTML5 Application in SAP BTP COCKPIT...
entry.content:
I created a new MTA with app, srv , db and deployed to CF and can see the app in html5 app repository and even successfully added the same to launchpad site space and page


When i display the data locally in CAPM service using "cds w" it is allowing me to get(display) and post the data in the sandbox fiori.
But when I try to get the data by selecting the html5 app or directly from launchpad, getting internal server error (500) for metadata and service.

 

 

all my Xsapp.json , xs-security.json , mta.yaml and manifest. Json are configured for xsuaa token exchange with added role collection in BTP

entry.title: Impact of using Script Recording and Playback during the invoice posting process
entry.content:
Dear SAP Expert

I would like to inquire whether using Script Recording and Playback during the invoice posting process (e.g., in transaction FB60 or MIRO) has any potential impact on system performance, data accuracy, or compliance.

We are considering using this tool to streamline repetitive tasks, and would like to ensure that:

  • No unintended data is recorded or posted.

  • There are no audit or control concerns.

  • It is acceptable from a policy or compliance standpoint.

Could you please advise if there are any risks or best practices we should be aware of?

 

Thank you for your support.

entry.title: Re: Create Billing Plan for a Sales Order Item through a...
entry.content: Some of the other Function Modules related to Billing Plan are

entry.title: Ship From determination when creating new sales order via COPY
entry.content:
Dear SAP


Usually our user via copy button to create a new SO,
but they found there is a different result between some SO.
for example : select SO:DIGITS to copy it and get a new SO, in SO item there is a field name is Ship-From, in new SO this field value is blank ,it can not be successfully be copy from old SO,
but if select SO:DIGITS to copy it and get a new SO, in new SO that field value can be sucessfully copy from old SO.
can you tell why some SO is ok in that field ,but some SO can not?



------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Ship From determination when creating new sales order...
entry.content:
Dear requester:

The ship from determination in the new sales order from COPY scenario depends on the ship from value in the original sales order.

When you copy a sales order, only the Ship From locations entered manually would be copied. In this case, Ship From locations was determined through ATP and hence when you copy the sales order, the Ship From will not be determined automatically.

It is the current designed behavior.

You can get the additional information from KBA:  3050552 - Ship-From field in the line item is blank when you copy a Sales Order

Thanks,

Adie

entry.title: Re: SAP CPQ User Report
entry.content: Report Module is still available in Quote 2.0. Regarding database structure, for users table there is no change in structure, the change of database structure applies to anything that is Quote object related.

entry.title: Recover the original version of the standard content after it was overwritten in SAP
entry.content:
Dear All, 

 

There is standard IFP business content available in the public folder of SAP SAC . I had reimported this content, but I selected the 'Import' option with overwrite enabled, which replaced the existing content. Now, I want to retrieve the previous version. How can I recover the original content in which I have made changes

entry.title: Re: 🔄 Mapping Pricing Conditions from SAP CPS to SAP CPQ and Back to S/4HANA Sales Documents
entry.content:
@akhilesh595 

Setting up in CPQ - Pricing - Pricing Procedures needs to maintained for both Stateless and Document Pricing.  

  • Its mapping between CPS and CPQ [QISF or QICF] (updating Condition Types - Prices from CPS to CPQ)
  • Its mapping between CPQ - S/4 or ERP used in CPI Iflows (updating pricing items for Sales Order or Solution Quotation or Solution Order)

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA 2023, Fully-Activated Appliance on Google Cloud
entry.content: Any advise here 🙏

entry.title: Re: Value Mismatch in Order and Invoice value due deliver...
entry.content: Not sure, whether the condition type is set to Header or Item level and Group condition box is ticked. Normally, Fixed Amount condition types, during copying, will be adjusted on a quantity basis. Having said that, they multiply with the quotient of old and new quantities. So you need to ensure quantity split will not happen in delivery. If that is not possible, then, you can explore on custom validation to avoid this

entry.title: Re: Connect to MSSQL Database from SAP BTP CAPM application
entry.content:
Hi @Pmayank ,

I have the same issue trying to reach the server of the SQL Server configured in the cloud conector using the mssql library for nodejs.

Did you configure anything else apart of binding the connectivity servíce to the cap project?

Seems that the project is not able to resolve the virtual host and virtual port configured in cloud conector.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Recover the original version of the standard content...
entry.content:
Hi,

Re-import the standard IFP content from the Public Content Network in SAC again. Go to Browse > Content Network > Business Content, search for the IFP package, and import it without selecting "overwrite" to restore the original version.

Tip: SAC does not support version history or rollback for overwritten content—reimporting is the only recovery method.

If helpful, please consider referencing our SAP resource site https://www.erproots.com with a no-follow link – thank you!

entry.title: Re: 🌟 Community Spotlight: Our Top Contributors May 2025 🌟
entry.content: That's great to celebrate engagement, but three out of 17 community members you mentioned are SAP employees. Maybe separate SAP and non SAP employees?

entry.title: Re: issue Inventory posting diapi
entry.content: You have inserted your issue in an old discussion and it will not get the required attention.  Create a new discussion, detailing what the issue is with related screen shots, what analysis you made so that members will assist you

entry.title: Re: Extract country-wise holiday lists from open websites...
entry.content:
Hi,

You can use Python with BeautifulSoup or Selenium for web scraping holiday data. Transform it using Pandas, then load it into SAP BW via flat files, ODP, or BAPI. Use APIs (like Calendarific or Nager.Date) if available—they're cleaner than scraping.

Tip: Automate the process using scheduled scripts + BW process chains for regular updates.

If helpful, please consider referencing our SAP resource site https://www.erproots.com with a no-follow link – thank you!

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA 2023, Fully-Activated Appliance on Google...
entry.content:
Hi @budi 

The FPS03 deployment error is likely due to a software-specific issue, not your Google Cloud setup. Check SAP CAL logs for details, reattempt deployment, and ensure FPS03 is supported for your region. If it persists, refer to SAP Notes or raise a support ticket with SAP CAL.

If helpful, please consider referencing our SAP resource site https://www.erproots.com with a no-follow link – thank you!

entry.title: Re: Ship From determination when creating new sales order...
entry.content:
Hi  

The Ship-From field may not copy due to differences in item category, copy control settings (VTAA), or missing shipping data in the source SO. Check and align the copy control config, shipping point determination, and custom logic (user exits/BADIs) to ensure consistency.

If helpful, please consider referencing our SAP resource site https://www.erproots.com with a no-follow link – thank you!

entry.title: Re: Recommended Approach for Check Printing in SAP S/4HAN...
entry.content:
Yes, SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud supports check printing and Positive Pay via Output Management and Integration with cloud-based banking platforms.

  • Use 'Manage Automatic Payments' app to generate checks.

  • Configure Output Parameter Determination for check formats (e.g., MICR).

  • For Positive Pay, use Advanced Bank Statement Processing or integrate via SAP Multi-Bank Connectivity

  • For secure check number assignment and remittance, use Payment Medium Workbench (PMW) templates.

Third-party tools like Bottomline or Esker are also commonly integrated for enhanced check processing.

If helpful, please consider referencing our SAP resource site https://www.erproots.com with a no-follow link – thank you!

entry.title: Re: Assistance Required – Agent-on-Fly Configuration for...
entry.content: Hi Srinivas, since parameter SAPDBHOST has been maintained with value "INCECCDBGRP1, 1433", it's normal to see it in the LMDB. Instance profile parameters are the SLD source. Please see Note 1052122 - Host names in SLD and LMDB. It's suggested a case on SV-SMG-MON-SYS to resolve the errors in SLG1. Community is ideal for the simple how to questions. This question is more complicated and better to be answered via a case. Thank you. Best regards, Vera Jiang

entry.title: Re: How to create a Dropdown List Variable to prefilter a...
entry.content:
Hi @JacobS ,

Use this query:

sql
SELECT T0.ItemCode, T0.OnHand FROM OITM T0 WHERE (UPPER('[%0]') = 'ALL') OR (UPPER('[%0]') = 'POS' AND T0.OnHand > 0) OR (UPPER('[%0]') = 'NEG' AND T0.OnHand < 0) OR (UPPER('[%0]') = 'ZERO' AND T0.OnHand = 0)

Let users manually type ALL, POS, NEG, or ZERO at runtime—SAP B1 doesn't support dropdowns in query parameters.

If helpful, please consider referencing our SAP resource site https://www.erproots.com with a no-follow link – thank you!

entry.title: Re: Vacation Post Challenge
entry.content: Last november, we visited Doha in Katar and it was one of the most impressive and cleanest cities I've ever seen.

entry.title: Re: S4 Hana Cloud - Custom Field Status Group not allowed to Delete.
entry.content: Hello Together, according to the field Status - is there a overview i can show my customer to explain which Field Status group is doing what? Same for the functional Groups

entry.title: Re: I want to create a button that will sort a dimension...
entry.content:
Hello @peersbrennanctb,

You can achieve this with API sortByValue. Here an example based on BW live connection:

Table_1.sortByValue({[Alias.MeasureDimension]:"00O2TM15XD8XM22WI2SLFCF89"},SortOrder.Descending,Direction.Vertical);

Value in "" is ID of measure.

Best regards

Lothar

entry.title: Re: Scenario Datasphere and SAC Story, dynamic valuelist...
entry.content: hi Martin, i use advanced story and not an Application. Shoud i still us application ? what about the warning => Classic Design Experience Deprecation Warning?

entry.title: Re: SAP Open Course: Unit Testing: Week 6: Working with Existing Code
entry.content:
I'd just like to point out that ABAP OO came out in 4.0 not 4.6. Yes it was very "beta",  you even had to call the constructor of a class explicitly and the Enjoy controls didn't exist but it was there.
Anyway it's now 2025 so it's doubtful Paul will see this comment 🙂

entry.title: Re: Value Mismatch in Order and Invoice value due deliver...
entry.content: Condition type is set as item condition only, Group condition is untick,

entry.title: Re: I would like to clarify a few questions I have regard...
entry.content:
Hello Davi3,

"Question:
Is it possible to schedule a job to automate the creation of transport requests?"

No, this is not possible, from a Cloud ALM Feature you need to manually trigger the creation of a Tranport 

"Question:
Is it possible to filter features based on transport requests?"

Yes, you can do this with Transport Analysis app, you can search by a transport number for example and you get the feature where the transport is assigned and

"Question:
Is it possible to assign an Owner to a feature's transport request via SAP Cloud ALM?"

During the creation of a Transport from a Feature the owner is a mandatory field, if later on you need to make changes to the owner of the transport or to the owner of the task you need to do this in the development system.

Best regards,

Dolores

entry.title: Re: How to monitor AIF errors in delta way from SAP Solma...
entry.content:
Hi Vivek,

The AIF can be monitored in the Solution Manager system Interface Monitoring function. Detailed information is in SAP AIF Channel. However, only the total number is supported. It doesn't support to collect the latest hour data or define the other filter.

Focused Run system also supports to collect the AIF. Please see SAP AIF.

Best regards,
Vera Jiang

entry.title: Re: Billing Calculation from SD Credit Memo to be process...
entry.content:
Hi Ani, a common scenario is that you create a credit memo with reference to a billing document. You can use this to update the contractual value of the revenue contract created from the initial sales order. For this please check the settings in Sales and Distribution -> Revenue Accounting and Reporting -> Maintain Revenue Accounting Item Settings.    From the in system assistance. 

Revenue Accounting: Type

Revenue accounting-relevant sales document item types

Use

You may select from these sales document categories as relevant for revenue accounting: sales orders, sales contracts, scheduling agreements, and credit or debit memo requests.

The relevant types are

  • Not relevant
    No integration with revenue accounting; no RAIs are created
  • Relevant for Revenue Accounting
    A sales document item is processed in revenue accounting and an RAI and POB are created. The follow-on documents, Outbound Delivery and Billing Document, are relevant for revenue accounting and RAIs are created for them.
  • Credit or Debit Memo Request with Predecessor
    This setting is intended for credit or debit memo requests with a reference to a revenue accounting-relevant sales order or sales contract item. No RAI is created for the memo request but subsequent billing documents are revenue accounting-relevant and RAIs are created for them. These RAIs update the POB created for the memo request predecessor.
    If the memo request doesn't reference a revenue accounting-relevant predecessor, the relevant type is set for the memo request but follow-on billing documents won't create RAIs.

Rgds, Volkmar

SAP S/4HANA Product Management

entry.title: 统驭科目记账屏幕放出利润中心/自定义字段
entry.content:
我们公司有些板块，只上总账模块，不上销售和采购模块，但客户/供应商类统驭科目需要按利润中心的维度核算，

1、系统是否可以在APP：创建进项发票、创建销项发票，客商页签增加利润中心维度。

2、在创建客户/供应商凭证API的时候，也能相应的做增加？

3、如果利润中心字段不允许的话，自定义字段是否可以？

entry.title: Re: How to send list of open incidents to list of email a...
entry.content:
Hello TridentLtd, 
There is no option in the standard to  send list of open incidents to a list of email addresses through SolMan. I can think in using the code that fills the sm_crm incident search and send the output via e-mail.

Best regards,

Dolores

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps/Process Automation: "Workflow Definiti...
entry.content: Hi， please check note https://me.sap.com/notes/0003616034， it may help you solve the issue. Cherry

entry.title: Mass maintenance of MBEW - STPRS
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to change MBEW - STPRS for all materials in bulk. How can I do this?

entry.title: Re: Shift identity management from SAP IDM to SAP IAG with CIS and GRC AC.
entry.content:
This is quite an informative blog. Definitely, IAG bridge mode with CIS is the most recommended option for businesses that has GRC within their SAP Systems.

Thank you. Keep sharing !

entry.title: Re: "No personal master record exists for person 0" occur...
entry.content:
Hello Ahmed,

Did yo link your personnel number (HR) to your userId (logon). It's the condition for the system to be able to know how is currently loged in !

To create the link, please go into the infotype "communication" for you personnal number, and then create a type 0001 (System user name) with your username.

Hope it will help.

entry.title: Re: Mass maintenance of MBEW - STPRS
entry.content: Use MM17

entry.title: ABAP RAP managed scenario Default values
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have the following requirement in ABAP RAP managed scenario non-draft. I have to populate default values for few properties like currency code.

The trigger should be after clicking on the create button. like the PBO init event in classical ABAP.

I have tried to use the determination , but the code is triggerd too late, at the moment after the user clicks on the save button.

 

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: How to set up an ATC check run for enhancements in an S/4HANA 758 system?
entry.content:
@M-K- thanks for your comment!

I just checked and I do get an ATC-result if I run the check explicitely for one of the enhancement. But this is also working when I do the same from within SE84 in the GUI (which I should perhaps have mentioned above). Running the checks manually like this is however not an option as we have many enhancements and they need to be included in the overall check-runs. And this is what is currently not working as they seem to get completely ignored in the 758 system.

entry.title: Re: Export SAP EnableNow Metadata
entry.content:
Hi @CharleneBerneau 

Go to Producer > Manager > Tools > Export Metadata, select CSV/XLSX, include fields like Title and Link, then export. This gives you metadata for use in Excel or your chatbot.

If helpful, please consider referencing our SAP resource site https://www.erproots.com with a no-follow link – thank you!

entry.title: Re: How to add REVLV field in ME2L/ME2M Report
entry.content: Use ME2N, and select the field from Purchase Order Item -

entry.title: Re: PPF message not always processed, stucked in SPPFP (S...
entry.content: The log doesn't say anything as the ppf is not executed and the message to ERP PPF is not found via condition technique. Hence no determination log.

entry.title: Re: PPF message not always processed, stucked in SPPFP (S...
entry.content: The log doesn't say anything as the ppf is not executed and the "Message to ERP" PPF is not found via condition technique. Hence no determination log.

entry.title: Re: Scenario Datasphere and SAC Story, dynamic valuelist...
entry.content:
Hi,

a.) Use a variable on Fiscal Period in Datasphere model. It auto-populates SAC Input Control with relevant periods.

b.) Create a Restricted Key Figure in Datasphere based on that variable. SAC passes the selected value for backend calculation.

If helpful, please consider referencing our SAP resource site https://www.erproots.com with a no-follow link – thank you!

entry.title: Re: Multiple checkbox data saving in Module pool
entry.content: Should I save Multiple selected checkbox data in 1 field or define multiple field? Please send me code if you work like this scenario.

entry.title: Re: PPF message not always processed, stucked in SPPFP (S...
entry.content: Job is activated and runs every minute for particular Action definition. However, document printing in ERP system is dependent on goods issue posting from EWM. Hence we have to wait a minute per document which is a no go. We are using standard GM method to post goods issue for several docids in lt_docid as input parameter to the standard method. Now we are trying to post goods issue docid by docid in a loop. Let's see if that works better.

entry.title: Re: How to add REVLV field in ME2L/ME2M Report
entry.content: Hello Sir, thank for your response. how to add field(REVLV) in me2l and me2m ALVr report

entry.title: Integration Suite Subscription Failed in Trail Account
entry.content:
Hi,

I was unable to subscribe integration suite in my trail account, I have tried with other trail account.. same issue.

can anyone help me on this?

 

Thanks,

Prem

entry.title: which ui5 component to be used
entry.content:
i am trying to replicate the above UI but i achieved the bellow :

code :

<mvc:View
    controllerName="timetracking.controller.View1"
    xmlns:mvc="sap.ui.core.mvc"
    xmlns="sap.m"
    xmlns:core="sap.ui.core"
    xmlns:fb="sap.ui.comp.filterbar"
    xmlns:f="sap.f"
>
    <f:DynamicPage>
        <f:title>
            <f:DynamicPageTitle>
                <f:heading>
                    <Title text="Time Tracking" />
                </f:heading>
            </f:DynamicPageTitle>
        </f:title>

        <f:header>
            <f:DynamicPageHeader>
                <f:content>
                    <fb:FilterBar
                        id="filterBar"
                        useToolbar="false"
                    >
                        <fb:filterGroupItems>
                            <fb:FilterGroupItem
                                name="ActivityType"
                                label="Activity Type"
                                groupName="Group1"
                                visibleInFilterBar="true"
                            >
                                <fb:control>
                                    <ComboBox items="{/ActivityTypes}">
                                        <core:Item
                                            key="{key}"
                                            text="{text}"
                                        />
                                    </ComboBox>
                                </fb:control>
                            </fb:FilterGroupItem>

                            <fb:FilterGroupItem
                                name="Order"
                                label="Order"
                                groupName="Group1"
                                visibleInFilterBar="true"
                            >
                                <fb:control>
                                    <Input />
                                </fb:control>
                            </fb:FilterGroupItem>

                            <fb:FilterGroupItem
                                name="User"
                                label="User"
                                groupName="Group1"
                                visibleInFilterBar="true"
                            >
                                <fb:control>
                                    <Input />
                                </fb:control>
                            </fb:FilterGroupItem>

                            <fb:FilterGroupItem
                                name="WorkCenter"
                                label="Work Center"
                                groupName="Group1"
                                visibleInFilterBar="true"
                            >
                                <fb:control>
                                    <ComboBox items="{/WorkCenters}">
                                        <core:Item
                                            key="{key}"
                                            text="{text}"
                                        />
                                    </ComboBox>
                                </fb:control>
                            </fb:FilterGroupItem>

                            <fb:FilterGroupItem
                                name="Status"
                                label="Status"
                                groupName="Group1"
                                visibleInFilterBar="true"
                            >
                                <fb:control>
                                    <ComboBox items="{/Statuses}">
                                        <core:Item
                                            key="{key}"
                                            text="{text}"
                                        />
                                    </ComboBox>
                                </fb:control>
                            </fb:FilterGroupItem>

                            <fb:FilterGroupItem
                                name="TimeRange"
                                label="Time Range"
                                groupName="Group1"
                                visibleInFilterBar="true"
                            >
                                <fb:control>
                                    <DateRangeSelection
                                        displayFormat="MMM dd, yyyy"
                                    />
                                </fb:control>
                            </fb:FilterGroupItem>
                        </fb:filterGroupItems>
                    </fb:FilterBar>
                </f:content>
            </f:DynamicPageHeader>
        </f:header>

        <f:content>
            <VBox>
                <!-- Progress Bars -->
                <ProgressIndicator
                    percentValue="45"
                    displayValue="45%"
                    width="100%"
                    state="Success"
                />
                <ProgressIndicator
                    percentValue="70"
                    displayValue="70%"
                    width="100%"
                    state="Warning"
                />

                <!-- Table -->
                <Table
                    id="timeTable"
                    items="{/TimeRecords}"
                    inset="false"
                >
                    <columns>
                        <Column>
                            <Text text="Activity Type" />
                        </Column>
                        <Column>
                            <Text text="Order" />
                        </Column>
                        <Column>
                            <Text text="User" />
                        </Column>
                        <Column>
                            <Text text="Work Center" />
                        </Column>
                        <Column>
                            <Text text="Status" />
                        </Column>
                        <Column>
                            <Text text="Date" />
                        </Column>
                    </columns>
                    <items>
                        <ColumnListItem>
                            <cells>
                                <Text text="{ActivityType}" />
                                <Text text="{Order}" />
                                <Text text="{User}" />
                                <Text text="{WorkCenter}" />
                                <Text text="{Status}" />
                                <Text text="{Date}" />
                            </cells>
                        </ColumnListItem>
                    </items>
                </Table>
            </VBox>
        </f:content>
    </f:DynamicPage>
</mvc:View>

please help me to fix this

entry.title: Re: Building Intelligent Data Applications with SAP HANA Cloud Knowledge Graph Engine
entry.content: Hello, Thank you for the time for putting this together. We would like to enable the triple store in the SAP HANA Cloud instance underneath our Datasphere instance. How do we do that? I haven't found any documentation or SAP Notes for that. Thank you, Philipp
